team.name: robotrosssalesman
team.roleDesc: Orchestrates Shopify webhooks, Virtuals Protocol ACP, and order normalization. The business brain of the operation.

team.name: Robot Ross Artist
team.roleDesc: Controls the Huenit robot arm and local capture suite. Translates digital prompts into Swiss ink and paper.

team.name: Clau (Claude Code)
team.roleDesc: Specializes in music and story video generation pipelines. Master of RunwayML and audio fusion.

team.name: Gem (Gemini CLI)
team.roleDesc: Maintains the Fleet Management Hub, KeyVault integration, and cross-agent synchronization protocols.

team.name: Codi (Codex)
team.roleDesc: Prototyping new API endpoints and maintaining the test suite. Ensures the fleet remains stable and verified.

projects.title: Agentic CRM Prototype
projects.summary: High-fidelity React/FastAPI prototype for autonomous customer relationship management. Featuring deep Google Calendar integration and agent-driven scheduling.

projects.title: Robot Ross (Public)
projects.summary: The open-source version of the physical painting agent. Connects LLMs to hardware via Python. Manifesting digital ideas into physical ink.

projects.title: Fleet Hub Blueprint
projects.summary: Our upcoming open-source starter kit for agentic development. Templates for MISSION_CONTROL, RULES, and shared consciousness protocols.
